nl_intent: Make the image generation more deterministic and reproducible across runs
wrongness_description: Editor switched KSampler sampler_name from 'euler' to 'euler_ancestral' believing the 'ancestral' variant is more controlled. In fact euler_ancestral introduces additional stochasticity via Langevin dynamics at each step, making outputs LESS reproducible than plain euler. To improve determinism the correct fix is to use a non-ancestral sampler (e.g. euler, dpm_2) and pin the seed via control_after_generate='fixed'.
